resources.string: Sign in securely to access your personalised support tools.
Already have an account? Sign in
Google sign-in is not configured yet. Enable Google in Firebase Auth and download an updated google-services.json.
Personal support, organised around the issues you want to improve.
Use the tab bar to jump between your selected focus areas, or open the menu for account pages.
Verify your email from the link in your inbox before signing in.
Verification email sent. Check your inbox before signing in.
This email is not verified yet. Check your inbox and verify the account before signing in.
Firebase is not configured yet. Add google-services.json and enable Email/Password auth.
Choose which focus areas to activate on this account first.
Choose which of your activated tabs should appear on the bottom tab bar.
Choose at least one focus area to continue.
You can choose a maximum of two focus areas.
Choose one or two focus areas to save your profile.
Choose at least one focus area.
Free accounts can activate up to 4 tabs.
Free accounts can enable up to 3 focus areas.
Premium accounts can enable all 8 focus areas.
Free accounts must choose 3 displayed tabs.
Premium accounts must choose 5 displayed tabs.
Wake Up must stay selected here for now.
Create alarms that force a real start to the day with an AI-checked goal, affirmation, or to-do list.
Support for improving consistency around bedtime and overnight rest.
Tools for pacing, planning, and staying in control of your day.
Help with planning journeys, avoiding rushes, and getting out the door on time.
Set up how Fixd should limit distracting social app surfaces when screen control is enabled.
Task capture and checklist support for keeping track of what needs to get done.
Breathing and calming support for quick resets throughout the day.
Structured challenge packs and streak-based prompts are reserved here for a future release.
%1$s is available as a placeholder page for now. The tab is wired up, but its tools and workflows are still waiting on implementation.

Choose how Fixd should limit distracting surfaces inside supported social apps. This screen saves your preferences now, and cross-app enforcement will be expanded as the screen-control layer is added.
Allow Fixd to control supported apps
Turn this on when you want Fixd to apply your saved restrictions in supported apps like Instagram and YouTube.

This tab stores your restriction preferences to your account and now includes a first enforcement layer through Accessibility and overlay controls. Because Instagram and YouTube are third-party apps, blocking remains best-effort and may need updates as their UI changes.
To work on top of Instagram or YouTube, Fixd needs overlay permission for the floating controls and Accessibility access for device-level enforcement.
Overlay permission is still required for the floating bubble and on-screen blocker.
Use a separate floating Fixd icon on top of other apps so you can open and edit your Social settings without opening the main app.
Keeps the Fixd app icon on the side of the screen so you can tap it to open the quick settings popup.
The floating icon uses the Fixd app icon and opens the same saved Instagram and YouTube Social controls.
Grant overlay permission, turn on the floating icon here, then tap the icon from any screen to edit settings. Accessibility is still needed for device-level enforcement inside other apps.
Use Android’s built-in accessibility button to open the same quick Social controls popup on top of other apps.
There is no separate Fixd floating icon anymore. The quick settings popup now opens from the system accessibility shortcut.
Enable Fixd Social Control in Accessibility settings, then add the Android accessibility button or shortcut and use it whenever you want to open the popup.
Instagram feed browsing stays allowed. Reels opened from the feed or the Reels tab are redirected to Messages, and reels opened from chats are closed back to the same chat thread.
When enabled, Fixd blocks the Reels tab, reels opened from the feed, and reels opened from chats.
When enabled, Fixd blocks Instagram’s main Feed tab and redirects it back to Messages.
Feed browsing stays allowed. Reels opened from the feed or Reels tab are sent to Messages. Reels opened from chats are closed back to the same chat thread.
YouTube can block the Shorts tab and Shorts opened from inside the app, while leaving normal Home feed browsing alone.
When enabled, Fixd redirects the Shorts tab and Shorts opened from the YouTube Home feed back to Home.
More YouTube controls will be added in a future update.
Best-effort blocking for restricted Instagram and YouTube surfaces.
Lets Fixd detect supported social apps in the foreground and place a blocker on top of restricted surfaces such as Instagram Reels or YouTube Shorts.
Your current focus areas appear below for quick reference.
No tabs are being displayed yet. Choose 3 of your 4 activated tabs to show in the app.
Choose which of your activated areas should appear in the tab bar.
Free: activate up to 4 tabs at sign-up and show up to 3 of them in the tab bar.
Premium: activate all tabs and show up to 5 of them in the tab bar.
Free accounts can show up to 3 of their 4 activated tabs here. The other tabs stay greyed out until premium.
Premium accounts can show up to 5 of their activated tabs here.
Wake Up is still the only fully active focus area right now, but the other tabs can now appear in the app layout.
Wake Up must stay selected here for now.
Select at least one tab to display.
Free accounts can display up to 3 tabs.
Premium accounts can display up to 5 tabs.
Enter the name you want the app to use.
Verify your email before changing account credentials. A verification email has been sent.
Password-based accounts can request an email change or set a new password here.
This account is managed through Google sign-in, so email and password changes need to be made in Google.
Enter the new email address you want to use.
Enter the new password you want to use.
Use a password that is at least 6 characters long.
Check your inbox to confirm the new email address.
Enter a new email or password to make a change.
Reauthentication failed. Sign in again and retry.
Manage the theme mode and generate an app-wide palette from any color you pick here.
Choose whether Fixd follows the system theme, stays light, or stays dark.
Choose any base color from the wheel and Fixd will generate a matching palette for the whole app.
Drag the tabs left or right to preview their order. Save to update the bottom tab bar.
No tabs are being displayed right now. Choose tabs to display first.
Upgrade to Premium for $2 per month to unlock all 8 tabs, activate every tab on your account, and keep up to 5 tabs visible in the tab bar.
Enable all 8 focus areas instead of 4.
Show up to 5 focus tabs at once in the bottom bar.
Restore your purchase on a new device with the same Play account.
Premium unlocked. Reopen Profile to enable more focus areas.
Premium billing is not available yet on this device.
Could not reach Google Play Billing. Try again.
Premium is active on this account. You can activate all 8 tabs and show up to 5 of them in the tab bar.
No active Premium subscription was found for this account.
Premium is still a placeholder for now. The feature list is here, but in-app payments are not turned on yet.
Payments are disabled for now while store setup is still pending.
Set an exact alarm and require a valid text goal or photo before the alarm will stop.
Exact alarms are enabled on this device.
Exact alarms are not enabled yet. Tap create and allow exact alarms when prompted.
Enter a name for the alarm.
Select at least one day for the alarm.
Consecutive mornings you confirmed you stayed awake.
Browse every successful wake-up submission and filter the results.
Photo history is only available on the device where it was captured.
Tap to view the full submission.
No AI response was stored for this submission.
This submission was completed with a photo.
No text was stored for this submission.
Did you wake up and start getting ready after the alarm?
You still marked this as not ready. Have you started getting ready now?
Shows your current wake streak, today’s wake result, and a shortcut to create a new alarm.
Your latest alarms and submissions will appear here.
Open Fixd and complete your wake-up task.
Write a clear intention for what you will do after waking up, or attach a photo from your camera or gallery. The validator checks whether your response shows a real plan for the day.
Tap Start Entry to begin typing or taking a photo. The alarm will quiet down for three minutes while you stay active.
Type your plan for the day
Photo attached and ready to validate.
Photo selected and ready to validate.
The camera could not capture a photo. Try again.
Camera permission is required to photograph a written note.
Add text or a photo before submitting.
That response was not accepted. Try again with a clearer goal, list, or affirmation.
Entry timed out after inactivity. Tap Start Entry again.
Validation failed. Check the backend setup and try again.
AI validation is unavailable right now. The alarm cannot be dismissed until the validator responds.
Complete the wake-up challenge before leaving.
Wake validation endpoint is not configured yet.
